content: Claude Code plugin.json: only 'name' is truly required. Name must be kebab-case per /^[a-z][a-z0-9]*(-[a-z0-9]+)*$/ (letter start required, not digit). Manifest MUST be at .claude-plugin/plugin.json at plugin root. Skills/commands/agents sit at plugin root, NOT inside .claude-plugin/. A common bug: components nested inside .claude-plugin/ where Claude Code does not look. Changes to SKILL.md take effect immediately but hooks/agents require /reload-plugins. No parent directory paths (../). Version bump required for distributed updates due to caching. Unknown top-level fields in plugin.json are ignored — does not break loading.
